notes: Kentucky primary participation is party-registration based, so the electorate is modeled as registered Republican primary voters.
No-excuse in-person absentee voting began May 14 and ran before election day.
Statewide early ballots are useful turnout context but not district-party vote totals.
Big Data Poll reported Massie strength among planned early no-excuse voters.
Big Data Poll reported Gallrein strength among planned Election Day voters.
Scenario-width input reflecting uncertainty around high-propensity versus lower-propensity primary electorate composition.
